subject: [PATCH v4 04/10] fuse: use enum types for header copying

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch improves the interface for copying headers in the FUSE file system by introducing enum types to identify which part of the header needs to be copied. This simplifies both kernel-space and user-space header addresses copying, particularly when buffer rings are added. The patch introduces an enum type `fuse_uring_header_type` with values for different header types and modifies existing functions to use this new type. The changes improve code readability and maintainability.
